ideation: This sequence simulates a rescue worker carefully placing a helmet on their head.  The animation will focus on the deliberate and precise movements involved in this action.  Frame 1 will show both arms at the sides. Frame 2 will have the right arm reaching up towards the helmet. Frame 3 will show the helmet being placed on the head. Frame 4 will have the arms returning to their sides.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready for action
right arm reaches up, preparing to place the helmet
gently placing the helmet on the head with care
arms return to rest, mission accomplished
